title: Turkey Inter-University Football Tournament of Champions Announced
content:
Student

News

Details

Turkey Inter-University Football Tournament of Champions Announced

The champion of the Intercollegiate Football Tournament organized by Turkish University Sports Federation has been announced. Our team, which plays in the second league, defeated Işık University 2-1 in Şile Stadium exhibiting an exhilarating performance.

We wish the Doğuş University football team, which is entitled to play in the first league after this win, continued success.
